title: dryopteris senanensis
intro: Dryopteris senanensis, also known as Japanese male fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of D. senanensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
